title: B'Crevnis
content:
{{Top|leg|title=b'Crevnis}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=B'Crevnis |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Pho Ph'eahian]][[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Outbound Flight Project]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Speaking of solving things, Chas, did you ever figure out that line fluctuation problem you were having yesterday? We had to shut down the whole portside turbolaser system.''"
"''Oh, yeah, we got it sorted it out. This'll kill you. You know b'Crevnis, that big terminally cheerful Pho Ph'eahian who's supposed to be in charge of fluid-flow maintenance? It seems he managed to mislabel one of his own gauges …|Jobe Keely and Chas Uliar|}} '''B'Crevnis''' was a large [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pho Ph'eahian]] who was in charge of fluid-flow maintenance on ''[[Outbound Flight]]''. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=B'Crevnis |fi=B'Crevnis }} [[Category:Judicial Department personnel]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Outbound Flight residents]] [[Category:Pho Ph'eahians]]
